text: Luyhas are waking up to the reality that Sifuna is a Kikuyu/Gachagua puppet to return power to Mt. Kenya and continue Kikuyu ethnic domination!
RT @Dr_AustinOmondi: Rigathi Gachagua has called on the Kikuyu community to treat Moses Kuria as an outcast going forward.
WAJALUO WAKIWA KWA SERIKALI NDIO MNASEMA RUTO NI WANTAM WAKIKUYU HAMTAKI WAJALUO WAPATE MAENDELEO!! ANGRY OMOSH

@Kenyans Yes @PSCharlesHinga and the pressure will increase my fren you the scam housing levy, and corupt incompetent kasongo govt will not sleep, yes we are haters, we hate you kasongo and all kenyan polishtians killing Kenyans. @citizentvkenya @KTNNewsKE @ntvkenya

@madam_CX5 Thank God we Kikuyus thrashed that homeguard family in 2022. We are under no illusions about their selfishness. Selfish Kenyatta family, kazi yao ni ku sabotage the mountain. Hatuwatambui!!
